articles.title: The OKC game is going to be very important
articles.original_title: The OKC game is going to be very important
articles.summary: if we can beat OKC today, and the Spurs beat Denver next game. We are pretty much locked for 3rd seed. And OKC and Spurs are neck and neck for number 1 seed It is going to be hard for Denver to drop all the way to 6th, since Houston and Minnesota play eachother one more time, so one of them will guarantee have an extra L. We can most likely rest our starters for the last 3 games of the season if this happens. We can be the most rested team going into the playoff in the West.    submitted by

articles.title: Just foolin': Wizards sorry about $10K shot 'skit'
articles.original_title: Just foolin': Wizards sorry about $10K shot 'skit'
articles.summary: The Wizards have apologized for an April Fools' "skit" in which a planted fan was seemingly tricked into believing he made a half-court shot for $10,000, saying the entire bit was scripted but that they "missed the mark."

articles.title: Michigan starter Elliot Cadeau joins teammates at Final Four after accidental exposure to nuts
articles.original_title: Michigan starter Elliot Cadeau joins teammates at Final Four after accidental exposure to nuts
articles.summary: Michigan starting point guard Elliot Cadeau rejoined his teammates for the Final Four and said Thursday his allergic reaction that required hospitalization a day earlier was due to an accidental exposure to nuts.  “I just ate something I was allergic to,” the junior said as he sat at his locker at Lucas Oil Stadium, two days before the Wolverines meet fellow No. 1 seed Arizona in the national semifinals.  Coach Dusty May said Cadeau, who averages 10.2 points and 5.8 assists, is “fine.”

articles.title: A New England furniture store will refund customers if both UConn teams make the NCAA title games
articles.original_title: A New England furniture store will refund customers if both UConn teams make the NCAA title games
articles.summary: College basketball players aren't the only ones poised to win big in this year's March Madness.  A New England furniture chain is offering to reimburse customers for products purchased earlier this year if both the UConn men’s and women’s basketball teams reach the championship games.  For Brian Mazzilli of Plymouth, Massachusetts, that could mean a $3,800 refund for a living room sofa and coffee table.

articles.title: UConn star sophomore Sarah Strong named the AP Player of the Year in women's college basketball
articles.original_title: UConn star sophomore Sarah Strong named the AP Player of the Year in women's college basketball
articles.summary: Sarah Strong of UConn was named The Associated Press women’s basketball Player of the Year on Thursday after leading the Huskies to an undefeated season, setting the stage for a run to the Final Four.  Strong became just the fifth player to win the award in her sophomore year, joining Oklahoma’s Courtney Paris (2007), UConn stars Maya Moore (2009) and Breanna Stewart (2014), and USC's JuJu Watkins, who won it last year.  It's the 13th time that a Huskies player has won the award with Paige Bueck
